examples:
Command Example
#
Assume the following:
Entry Context:
{
"EWS"
:
{

!SetGridField_CopyForInvestigation columns=`User id,Risk level,Score,Reasons` grid_id=xdrriskyusers context_path=`PaloAltoNetworksXDR.RiskyUser` keys=`id,risk_level,score,reasons` keys_from_nested=description,points,severity
Troubleshooting
#
The first time you run
SetGridField
on a newly created grid field, you may see an error similar to the following:
To resolve the error:
Make sure the grid field is associated with the incident type the field is being used in.

!setIncident <GRID_FIELD_NAME>=[]
